zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Cole Hussey於1622年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州里士滿時，她的父親Sir James Hussey, Esq.28歲，母親Elizabetha Cole18歲。她於1643年與Rawleigh Travers在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1697年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Cole Hussey于1622年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州里士滿时，她的父亲Sir James Hussey, Esq.28岁，母亲Elizabetha Cole18岁。她于1643年与Rawleigh Travers在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1697年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州蘭卡斯特蘭卡斯特享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hussey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a nickname for someone who habitually wore a distinctive pair of boots or gaiters, from Old French hosed, hoset, housé, Middle English hosey, hus(s)y,‘booted, gaitered’ (from Latin hosatus).

English: status name or nickname from Middle English hus(e)wyf ‘mistress of a family; wife of a householder’ (a compound of Old English hūs ‘house’ + wīf ‘woman’). Though originally a woman's name, it is often found as a male surname, presumably in a derogatory sense. The vocabulary word became hussie, with the meaning ‘disreputable woman’, in the 16th century; the surname, however, is not associated with this meaning.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’. This was the name of a bardic family associated with the Maguires of Fermanagh, also Anglicized as Oswell or Oswald .

variants.name: Hosea
meanings: English: variant of   Hussey  . Similarity with the Old Testament prophet's name Hosea (see 3 below) is accidental.
English: in Scotland, where the name is more common, it is sometimes a variant of   Hosie  , itself a form of   Hussey  , or else a variant of   Hossack  .
African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the Biblical personal name Hosea. In the Old Testament, Hosea was a prophet who married a prostitute in order to illustrate Israel's unfaithfulness to God.

variants.name: Hosie
meanings: Scottish (northeast Scotland): variant of Irish   Hussey  .

variants.name: Oswell
meanings: Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa ‘descendant of Eodhus’ (see Hussey ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Cole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, itself derived from a medieval given name which may be a reduced form of Nicholas or represent a survival into Middle English of the Old English byname Cola ‘swarthy, coal-black’, from col ‘charcoal’. As a given name, it is associated with the songwriter Cole Porter ( 1893–1964 ) and has enjoyed a degree of popularity in recent times.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Cole Hussey was born in 1622, in Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Sir James Hussey, Esq., was 28 and her mother, Elizabetha Cole, was 18. She married Rawleigh Travers in 1643, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1697, in Lancaster, Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Cole Hussey est née en 1622, à Richmond, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Sir James Hussey, Esq., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabetha Cole, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Rawleigh Travers en 1643, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1697, à Lancaster, Lancaster, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 75 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cole Hussey è nata il nel 1622 nel Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, sua padre, Sir James Hussey, Esq., aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabetha Cole, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Rawleigh Travers nel 1643, nel Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1697, nel Lancaster, Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cole Husseyが1622年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州リチモンドで生まれた時，父Sir James Hussey, Esq.は28歳，母Elizabetha Coleは18歳であった。1643年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでRawleigh Traversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1697年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ランカスターランカスターで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cole Hussey(이)가 1622년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 리ch몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir James Hussey, Esq.(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabetha Cole(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1643년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Rawleigh Travers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1697년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 랭커스터 랭커스터에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Cole Hussey nasceu em 1622, em Richmond, Virginia, British Colonial America, seu pai, Sir James Hussey, Esq., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabetha Cole, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Rawleigh Travers em 1643, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1697, em Lancaster, Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Cole Hussey родилась в 1622 г. в местности ричмонд, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Sir James Hussey, Esq. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabetha Cole, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rawleigh Travers в 1643 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1697 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкастир, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Rawleigh Travers en 1643, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1697, en Lancaster, Lancaster, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 75 años.
